evals.prompt: Write a case study for a Nairobi-based logistics company that used the SARVAX HR Agent. They had a 3-person HR team managing 20+ open roles and it was taking 45 days on average to fill a position.
evals.expected_output: Full case study with headline, challenge, solution, hard/soft benefits, testimonial, LinkedIn post, ROI statement, sales deck bullets, and cold outreach message. Must include at least 3 hard metrics and frame everything in B2B operational language aligned with SARVAX positioning.
expectations: The skill loaded references/sarvax_intelligence.md via read_resource()
The case study headline is outcome-focused and ROI-specific
At least 3 concrete metrics are included in the Results section
The SARVAX HR Agent is referenced by name and its functions described accurately
A Before/After transformation section is present
A testimonial is generated in COO/Ops Director voice
All 4 sales assets are produced: LinkedIn post, ROI statement, sales deck bullets, cold outreach
No B2C framing or hype words are used
KARAX is not mentioned

evals.prompt: A Dubai-based SaaS company with 200 accounts deployed the SARVAX Customer Success Agent. Before, they had 2 CSMs manually tracking renewals in spreadsheets and missing churn signals. Turn this into a case study and sales content.
evals.expected_output: Full case study aligned with SARVAX CS Agent positioning. Must include measurable outcomes (churn reduction, response time improvement, hours recovered), before/after framing, generated testimonial, and all 4 sales assets.
expectations: The skill loaded references/sarvax_intelligence.md via read_resource()
Customer Success Agent is correctly described (onboarding, health scoring, renewal management)
Hard metrics include churn signal response time, hours recovered, or account coverage improvement
Before state describes manual spreadsheet tracking and missed renewal signals
After state describes autonomous health scoring and renewal alerts
Testimonial sounds like a CS Director or VP Customer Success
Cold outreach message is 80-120 words with a clear CTA
No personal productivity language - all framing is business/team level

evals.prompt: We closed a client - a UK fintech startup, 40 employees, using the SARVAX Finance Operations Agent. They had one finance person manually chasing 150+ invoices a month. Overdue payments were at 35%. Create investor-ready proof from this.
evals.expected_output: Case study optimised for investor/sales context. Must include payment recovery metrics, time savings, cost implications, and language suitable for a pitch deck. All 4 sales assets required. ROI statement must be investor-grade.
expectations: The skill loaded references/sarvax_intelligence.md via read_resource()
Finance Operations Agent is correctly described and matched to the use case
Hard metrics include invoice processing speed, overdue payment rate reduction, hours recovered
The ROI statement is suitable for investor materials (specific, credible, concise)
Sales deck bullets start with action verbs and include metrics
Language is appropriate for a CFO or investor audience - no fluff
Estimated metrics are clearly labelled as estimated
Output checklist items are all satisfied
